title: taraxacum retroversum
intro: Taraxacum retroversum is a rare, lesser-known species of the Taraxacum genus, commonly referred to as a dandelion plant, although it is not as widely distributed as the more common Taraxacum officinale. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum retroversum include its use as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of edema, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support liver function, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum retroversum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
